fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Workspace settings register the repo Copilot hook configuration so VS Code can load it for this checkout. 2. A Stop hook command runs after the agent stops, reads the Copilot transcript session, and persists it through session-api without rewriting existing transcript history. 3. Existing PostToolUse reminders remain configured alongside the new stop-hook capture path. 4. Focused tests cover the transcript-to-session payload adapter and hook-entry capture flow. 5. A focused simulated hook invocation proves the stop-hook path writes session files.
fields.title: [session-api] Wire VS Code Copilot stop-hook session capture
